title: Financial Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate accounting, investing, banking, insurance, securities, and other financial activities of a branch, office, or department of an establishment.

tasks.text: Establish and maintain relationships with individual or business customers or provide assistance with problems these customers may encounter.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee the flow of cash or financial instruments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, or coordinate the activities of workers in branches, offices, or departments of establishments, such as branch banks, brokerage firms, risk and insurance departments, or credit departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate data pertaining to costs to plan budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish procedures for custody or control of assets, records, loan collateral, or securities to ensure safekeeping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with stockholders or other investors to provide information or to raise capital.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or analyze information to assess the current or future financial status of firms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Approve, reject, or coordinate the approval or rejection of lines of credit or commercial, real estate, or personal loans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare financial or regulatory reports required by laws, regulations, or boards of directors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine, evaluate, or process loan applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate financial reporting systems, accounting or collection procedures, or investment activities and make recommendations for changes to procedures, operating systems, budgets, or other financial control functions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Network within communities to find and attract new business.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare operational or risk reports for management analysis.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review collection reports to determine the status of collections and the amounts of outstanding balances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review reports of securities transactions or price lists to analyze market conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
